_note: All 294 seats sourced from ECI ResultAcGenMay2026 (scraped 5 May 2026). AC #144 Falta excluded — repoll 21 May, result 24 May 2026. Vote data is from ECI candidateswise pages. District and reservation from Wikipedia/ECI delimitation.

constituencies.note: Senior INC leader Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury falls to BJP in Baharampur.
Closest margin statewide — just 323 votes separate AITC and BJP.

constituencies.winner: Joydeb Halder S/o - Kartick Chandra Halder

constituencies.note: Abhishek Banerjee's Diamond Harbour — AITC holds with a 31,266 margin.
Repoll 21 May 2026; result 24 May 2026. EVM tampering allegations.
AISF's Naushad Siddiqui retains Bhangar — the only non-Murshidabad seat won outside BJP and AITC.
CM contest: Suvendu Adhikari (BJP) defeats Mamata Banerjee (AITC) in her home turf.
Singur — historic Tata Nano agitation seat — falls to BJP.
Suvendu Adhikari retains Nandigram — the seat that triggered the 2021 BJP surge.
